title: Department Manager Vacancy at Reliance Footprint - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Reliance Footprint - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Reliance Footprint! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Reliance Footprint:
Reliance Footprint is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Footprint!
